data.body: Patchset 4: also removed the CLI help byte-parity change-detector (tests/interfaces/facades/test_cli_argparse.py::test_help_byte_parity + 333 tests/golden/cli_help/*.out snapshots) that adding --ref exposed. Those goldens pinned the CLI byte-for-byte to the retired bash dispatcher (E1 cutover); post-cutover they only re-asserted 'help bytes == last capture' — a change-detector broken by any help edit. Replaced with live behavior tests (help-form equivalence, routing coverage, unknown/help-unknown stream+exit contracts). Prior CI misses on this change: docs/cli-reference.md drift (patchset 2) and the help golden (patchset 3), both from the --ref surface change.
